title: Folk API Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for the Folk REST API resources

message.example: You have exceeded your rate limit.

approximateCount.description: The approximate number of interactions between the current user and the contact.

lastInteractedAt.description: The last interaction date between the current user and the contact.

approximateCount.description: The approximate number of interactions of your workspace with the contact.

lastInteractedAt.description: The last interaction date of your workspace with the contact.

lastInteractedBy.description: List of users in your workspace who last interacted with the contact.

InteractionMetadata.description: Metadata about interactions with the user and workspace.

firstName.description: The first name of the person.

lastName.description: The last name of the person.

fullName.description: The full name of the person.

description.description: A short description of the person.
description.example: A brief description of the person.

birthday.description: The birthday of the person, in ISO format.

jobTitle.description: The job title of the person.

createdAt.description: The date and time the person was created, in ISO format.

groups.description: The groups associated with the person.

companies.description: The companies associated with the person. The first company in the list is the person's primary company.

items.description: An address associated with the person. The first address in the list is the person's primary address.
An email address associated with the person. The first email address in the list is the person's primary email address.
A phone number associated with the person. The first phone number in the list is the person's primary phone number.
A URL associated with the person. The first URL in the list is the person's primary URL.

anyOf.description: A custom field value as a string.
An array of values for the custom field.
An array of users associated with the custom field.
An array of relationships associated with the custom field.

strongestConnection.description: For each group the person is in, the workspace member with the strongest connection to the person. If the person has no strongest connection, this will be an empty object. Only the groups for which the person has a strongest connection will be included.

example.description: John Doe is a software engineer at Tech Corp.

description.description: A short description of the company.
description.example: A brief description of the company.

fundingRaised.description: The amount in USD of funding raised by the company.

lastFundingDate.description: The date of the last funding round for the company, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

industry.description: The industry the company operates in.

foundationYear.description: The foundation year of the company, in YYYY format.

groups.description: The groups associated with the company.

items.description: An address associated with the company. The first address in the list is the company's primary address.
An email address associated with the company. The first email address in the list is the company's primary email address.
A phone number associated with the company. The first phone number in the list is the company's primary phone number.
A URL associated with the company. The first URL in the list is the company's primary URL.

createdAt.description: The date and time the company was created, in ISO format.

anyOf.description: A custom field value as a string.
An array of values for the custom field.
An array of users associated with the custom field.
An array of relationships associated with the custom field.

createdAt.description: The date and time the deal was created, in ISO format.

anyOf.description: A custom field value as a string.
An array of values for the custom field.
An array of users associated with the custom field.
An array of relationships associated with the custom field.

id.description: The ID of the entity connected to the note.

entityType.description: The type of the entity connected to the note. Can be `person`, `company` or `object`.

fullName.description: The full name of the entity connected to the note.

content.description: The content of the note. Can be in plain text or in markdown format.
content.example: This is a note about **John Doe**

visibility.description:
The visibility of the note.

- `public`: The note is visible to all users in the workspace.
- `private`: The note is visible only to the current user.

type.description: The type of the author of the note, it can be a user or a folk assistant.

id.description: The ID of the author of the note.

fullName.description: The full name of the author of the note.

email.description: The email of the author of the note.

deleted.description: Whether the author has been deleted and does not exist anymore.

type.description: The type of the author of the note, it can be a user or a folk assistant.

fullName.description: The name of the folk assistant that created the note.

type.description: The type of the author of the note, it can be a user or a folk assistant.

deleted.description: Whether the author has been deleted and does not exist anymore.

createdAt.description: The date and time the note was created, in ISO format.

deleted.description: Whether the parent note has been deleted and does not exist anymore.

id.description: The ID of the entity connected to the note.

entityType.description: The type of the entity connected to the note. Can be `person`, `company` or `object`.

fullName.description: The full name of the entity connected to the note.

content.description: The content of the parent note. If the parent note is not visible to the current user, this field will be null.
content.example: This is a parent note about John Doe

visibility.description:
The visibility of the note.

- `public`: The note is visible to all users in the workspace.
- `private`: The note is visible only to the current user.

type.description: The type of the author of the note, it can be a user or a folk assistant.

id.description: The ID of the author of the note.

fullName.description: The full name of the author of the note.

email.description: The email of the author of the note.

deleted.description: Whether the author has been deleted and does not exist anymore.

type.description: The type of the author of the note, it can be a user or a folk assistant.

fullName.description: The name of the folk assistant that created the note.

type.description: The type of the author of the note, it can be a user or a folk assistant.

deleted.description: Whether the author has been deleted and does not exist anymore.

createdAt.description: The date and time the parent note was created, in ISO format.

deleted.description: Whether the parent note has been deleted and does not exist anymore.

parentNote.description: The parent note, if this note is a reply to another note.

example.content: This is a parent note about John Doe

Note.description: A note linked to an entity.

example.content: This is a note about John Doe

parentNote.content: This is a parent note about John Doe

id.description: The ID of the entity connected to the reminder.

entityType.description: The type of the entity connected to the reminder. Can be `person`, `company` or `object`.

fullName.description: The full name of the entity connected to the reminder.

recurrenceRule.description: The recurrence rule of the reminder. The recurrence rule is a string that follows the iCalendar format specified in [RFC 5545](https://icalendar.org/iCalendar-RFC-5545/3-8-5-3-recurrence-rule.html).

visibility.description:
The visibility of the reminder.

- `public`: The reminder is visible to all users in the workspace.
- `private`: The reminder is visible only to the current user.

assignedUsers.description: A list of workspace users to be notified when the reminder is triggered. For private reminders, only the current user is notified.

nextTriggerTime.description: The next trigger time of the reminder.

lastTriggerTime.description: The last trigger time of the reminder.

allOf.description: The user who created the reminder.

createdAt.description: The date and time the reminder was created, in ISO format.

Reminder.description: A reminder linked to an entity.

id.description: The ID of the entity connected to the interaction.

entityType.description: The type of the entity connected to the interaction. Can be `person` or `company`.

fullName.description: The full name of the entity connected to the interaction.

dateTime.description: The date and time of the interaction.

content.description: The multi-line content of the interaction.
content.example:
Had a coffee with John Doe
Discussed the new project.

anyOf.description: An emoji representing the interaction type.
A messaging app used for the interaction.

type.description: The type of the interaction. Can be a predefined type or an emoji.

LoggedInteraction.description: An interaction linked to an entity.

example.title: Coffee with John Doe
example.content:
Had a coffee with John Doe
Discussed the new project.

name.description: A friendly name for the webhook.

subscribedEvents.description: The events the webhook is subscribed to, with optional filters. For more information on how to use filters, see the [create webhook documentation](/api-reference/webhooks/create-a-webhook).

redactedSigningSecret.description: The signing secret of the webhook.

createdAt.description: The date and time the webhook was created.

Webhook.description: A webhook listening to events from the workspace and sending them to a URL.

name.description: A friendly name for the webhook.

subscribedEvents.description: The events the webhook is subscribed to, with optional filters. For more information on how to use filters, see the [create webhook documentation](/api-reference/webhooks/create-a-webhook).

createdAt.description: The date and time the webhook was created.

signingSecret.description: The signing secret of the webhook.

WebhookWithSigningSecret.description: A webhook with a visible signing secret.
